Advanced Pickup.name: Advanced Pickup
Advanced Pickup.description: At the start of the turn, absorb BP within a range of 800 for the owner.

Adv Poison Top.name: Adv Poison Top
Adv Poison Top.description: Deal 80% damage to a small area of enemies and apply 2 Poisoned effects for 2 turns (Poisoned effects can deal up to 20000 damage).

Advanced Shrink.name: Advanced Shrink
Advanced Shrink.description: Reduce attack power by 80%, convert to health.
